name: anime-vocab-coach
description: A Chrome extension (Manifest V3) that turns anime/Japanese video watching into active vocabulary study:

scripts.pack: npm run typecheck && npm run build && rm -f dist/anime-vocab-coach.zip && cd extension && zip -rq ../dist/anime-vocab-coach.zip . -x 'icons/icon.svg' -x '*.DS_Store' && cd .. && echo 'Built dist/anime-vocab-coach.zip'
scripts.deploy:site: cd site && npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=animevocab
